texto: Are all societies doomed to amnesia—or are there communities that have preserved their collective cultural memory?The world, which is the private property of a few, suffers from amnesia. It is not an innocent amnesia. The owners prefer not to remember that the world was born yearning to be a home for everyone.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Galeano Eduardo que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Are all societies doomed to amnesia—or are there communities that have preserved their collective…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, home, amnesia, com foco em reflexao.
